summary: This role poses a significant threat to your personal wellbeing due to its very high stress levels, chronic trauma exposure, and one of the highest burnout rates in the healthcare sector. The requirement for rapid, high-stakes analytical reasoning during life-or-death crises directly conflicts with your preference for structured, procedural work. Furthermore, the lack of predictable daytime hours for junior practitioners makes this career path unsustainable for someone prioritizing work-life balance and emotional bandwidth.
